name: senior-dotnet-engineer
description: Hands-on production engineering for advanced C# and modern .NET systems.

interface.longDescription: Design, implement, review, and verify production .NET systems across advanced C#, ASP.NET Core, data access, distributed architecture, performance, security, resilience, observability, cloud delivery, and AI integration.
defaultPrompt: Implement this .NET change with production-grade tests and safeguards.
Find and measure the bottleneck in this C# or ASP.NET Core path.
Review this .NET architecture for reliability, security, and evolution.
